mapper.select: SELECT id, username, name, role, teacher_level, phone, email, status, create_time FROM sys_user ORDER BY id
SELECT id, username, name, role, teacher_level, phone, email, status, create_time FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, name, role, teacher_level, phone, email, status, create_time FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username}

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.name, u.role, u.teacher_level, u.phone, u.email, u.status, u.create_time, p.id AS parent_id FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN parent p ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.password = #{password} AND u.status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, name, role, teacher_level, phone, email, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{role}, #{teacherLevel}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status})
